system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_pallet_getbydate","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[DQT_PALLET_GETBYDATE]
(
	@tungay date,
	@denngay date
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT B.id, B.pallet_id, B.sophieu, B.malo_nguyenlieu, C.nguyenlieu, 
		B.dayy, B.rong, B.dai, B.sothanh, B.sothanh_daxuat, B.sokhoi,
		D.nguongoc, B.donhang, B.phanloai,
		sothanh_conlai = CASE WHEN B.phanloai = N'Hàng finger' THEN B.sothanh ELSE B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat END,
		--sokhoi_conlai = (B.dayy * B.rong * B.dai * (B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat)) / 1000000000,
		sokhoi_conlai = CASE WHEN B.phanloai = N'Hàng finger' THEN B.sokhoi - COALESCE(B.sokhoi_daxuat,0) ELSE (B.dayy * B.rong * B.dai * (B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat)) / 1000000000 END,
		B.dvt, OP.n_op,
		trangthai = CASE WHEN B.sothanh <= B.sothanh_daxuat THEN N'Xuất hết' ELSE N'Còn hàng' END,
		B.dain, B.ghichu, B.ngaytao, B.ngaysanxuat,
		FSC.fsc_name, B.machatluong
	INTO #PALLET_TONKHO
	FROM dqt_pallet_chitiet B 
		INNER JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva C ON B.id_nguyenlieu = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguongoc D ON B.xuatxu = D.id
		LEFT JOIN trtb_m_op OP ON B.congdoan = OP.c_op
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc FSC ON B.fsc_id = FSC.fsc_id
	WHERE B.active = 1 AND CAST(B.ngaytao AS date) BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay

	SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu, B.nguongoc, C.fsc_name
	INTO #PHOI_DAUVAO
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi A
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguongoc B ON A.xuatxu = B.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc C ON A.fsc_id = C.fsc_id
	WHERE A.madonhang IN (SELECT madonhang FROM #PALLET_TONKHO)
		AND LEN(A.madonhang) > 0
	GROUP BY madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu, B.nguongoc, C.fsc_name

	-- MÃ LÔ NGUYÊN LIỆU
	SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu = STRING_AGG(malo_nguyenlieu, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_MALO
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu
		FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO
		GROUP BY madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	-- NGUỒN GỐC
	SELECT madonhang, nguongoc = STRING_AGG(nguongoc, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_NGUONGOC
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, nguongoc
		FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO
		GROUP BY madonhang, nguongoc
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	-- TÌNH TRẠNG FSC
	SELECT madonhang, fsc_name = STRING_AGG(fsc_name, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_FSC
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, fsc_name
		FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO
		GROUP BY madonhang, fsc_name
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	SELECT A.id, A.pallet_id, A.sophieu, B.malo_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu, 
		A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.sothanh, A.sothanh_daxuat, A.sokhoi,
		C.nguongoc, A.donhang, A.phanloai,
		--sothanh_conlai = A.sothanh - A.sothanh_daxuat,
		--sokhoi_conlai = (A.dayy * A.rong * A.dai * (A.sothanh - A.sothanh_daxuat)) / 1000000000,
		A.sothanh_conlai,
		A.sokhoi_conlai,
		A.dvt, A.n_op,
		trangthai = CASE WHEN A.sothanh <= A.sothanh_daxuat THEN N'Xuất hết' ELSE N'Còn hàng' END,
		A.dain, A.ghichu, A.ngaytao, A.ngaysanxuat,
		D.fsc_name, A.machatluong
	FROM #PALLET_TONKHO A
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_MALO B ON A.donhang = B.madonhang
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_NGUONGOC C ON A.donhang = C.madonhang
		LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_FSC D ON A.donhang = D.madonhang

	DROP TABLE #PALLET_TONKHO, #PHOI_DAUVAO, #DONHANG_FSC, #DONHANG_NGUONGOC, #DONHANG_MALO;
	--SELECT B.id, B.pallet_id, B.sophieu, B.malo_nguyenlieu, C.nguyenlieu, 
	--	B.dayy, B.rong, B.dai, B.sothanh, B.sothanh_daxuat, B.sokhoi,
	--	D.nguongoc, B.donhang, B.phanloai,
	--	--sothanh_conlai = B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat,
	--	--sokhoi_conlai = (B.dayy * B.rong * B.dai * (B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat)) / 1000000000,

	--	sothanh_conlai = CASE WHEN B.phanloai = N'Hàng finger' THEN B.sothanh ELSE B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat END,
	--	sokhoi_conlai = CASE WHEN B.phanloai = N'Hàng finger' THEN B.sokhoi - COALESCE(B.sokhoi_daxuat,0) ELSE (B.dayy * B.rong * B.dai * (B.sothanh - B.sothanh_daxuat)) / 1000000000 END,
		
	--	B.dvt, OP.n_op,
	--	trangthai = CASE WHEN B.sothanh <= B.sothanh_daxuat THEN N'Xuất hết' ELSE N'Còn hàng' END,
	--	B.dain, B.ghichu, B.ngaytao, B.ngaysanxuat,
	--	FSC.fsc_name, B.machatluong
	--FROM dqt_pallet_chitiet B 
	--	INNER JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva C ON B.id_nguyenlieu = C.id
	--	LEFT JOIN tr_nguongoc D ON B.xuatxu = D.id
	--	LEFT JOIN trtb_m_op OP ON B.congdoan = OP.c_op
	--	LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc FSC ON B.fsc_id = FSC.fsc_id
	--WHERE B.active = 1	AND CAST(B.ngaytao AS date) BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.tr_nguongoc","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
